positive: A stylized, minimalist forest scene silhouette on a solid, slightly textured cream background. The main subject is a dense grouping of iconic woodland creatures and plants: a whimsical fox mid-leap, a gentle deer with alert ears, blooming oversized flowers, and tangled roots. Use deep, matte ink black and forest green colors with crisp white negative space for separation. The composition should be centralized and circular, forming a continuous border motif suitable for a full-chest print. Style should be highly detailed, elegant linework combined with strong, graphic silhouettes, evoking a whimsical, storybook engraving feel. Overhead, soft, directional rim lighting enhances the crispness of the edges. Vector illustration quality, high contrast, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, logo, trademark, watermark, sloppy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, jpeg artifacts, photo, photorealism
